name: Cursor
description: Cursor IDE agent via cursor --headless. Experimental harness — not exposed as a dedicated unit type yet. Available as a manual harness selection via the UI model picker when cursor is installed.
auth: none (local binary; credentials managed by Cursor IDE)

session.note: cursor --headless does not expose session flags. Stateless.

model_selection: controlled by Cursor IDE settings; no per-request flag
note: Cursor is available via the harness selector but does not have a dedicated unit type. Routes through the general cascade when harness='cursor' is selected.
